title: Refined Storage Jappafied
description: Refined storage textures updated to fit in with the 1.14+ textures created by Jappa!
body:
Refined storage did not seem to have updated their textures to the new texture style, so, I decided to do it myself! The old textures were filled with random noise and weird perspectives and angles, and that has been cleaned up here, with some clean, flat, and simple textures.

[Refined Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage) must be installed in order to see these textures in-game.

## Supported Mods
- [Refined Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage)
- [Refined Storage Addons](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage-addons)
- Reborn Storage (not on Modrinth)
- [Extra Disks](https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-disks)
- [RSInfinityBooster](https://modrinth.com/mod/rsinfinitybooster)
- [ExtraStorage](https://modrinth.com/mod/extrastorage)
- [Refined Cooking](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-cooking)
- Refined Storage 2 ([GitHub pre-releases](https://github.com/refinedmods/refinedstorage2))

## Block Textures
Block textures are coming soon! There are quite a few of them in refined storage and it may take some time. Please be patient. 

Constructive criticism is welcome!
